name: @threespot/wp-base-styles
description: Sass entry points and partials for front-end, admin, and Gutenberg styles used across Threespot WP projects.

scripts.lint:css: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 stylelint "**/*.scss" && printf "\033[32m✓ No CSS lint errors\033[0m\n"
scripts.lint:css:fix: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 stylelint "**/*.scss" --fix && printf "\033[32m✓ CSS lint fixes applied\033[0m\n"
